title: Kanika Palace
tagline: Kanika Palace — heritage city of Odisha

overview.short: Kanika Palace (Odia: କନିକା ରାଜବାଟୀ) is situated near Rajkanika town.
overview.description: Kanika Palace (Odia: କନିକା ରାଜବାଟୀ) is situated near Rajkanika town. It is 125 km from Bhubaneswar. One of the floors has been converted into a museum. It is home to the world's biggest crocodile skeleton.

topPlaces.name: Rajkanika
topPlaces.description: Rajkanika is a town and block of Kendrapara district in the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Panki, Kendrapada
topPlaces.description: Panki is a small village in Kendrapada district in the Indian state of Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Lakhmi Varaha Temple
topPlaces.description: Sri Sri Lakshmi Varaha Swamy Temple (Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ମୀବରାହ ସ୍ବାମୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is a 500-year-old Indian temple dedicated to Varaha, the boar incarnation of Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Chandabali
topPlaces.description: Chandabali (or Chandbali) is an old town in the Bhadrak district of Odisha, India on the bank of the River Baitarani.

topPlaces.name: Aul, Odisha
topPlaces.description: Aul is a town and the headquarters of Aul CD Block and Aul Tehsil in Kendrapara district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is 17 km from Chandabali.

topPlaces.name: Akhandalamani Temple
topPlaces.description: Akhandalamani Temple (pronounced [akʰɔɳɖɔlɔmɔɳi]) at Aradi village, Odisha, India, is dedicated to Lord Shiva (Baba Akhandalamani). Aradi is about 37 kilometres (23 mi) away from Bhadrak.

items.note: Rajkanika is a town and block of Kendrapara district in the Indian state of Odisha.
Panki is a small village in Kendrapada district in the Indian state of Odisha.
Sri Sri Lakshmi Varaha Swamy Temple (Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ମୀବରାହ ସ୍ବାମୀ ମନ୍ଦିର) is a 500-year-old Indian temple dedicated to Varaha, the boar incarnation of Vishnu.
Chandabali (or Chandbali) is an old town in the Bhadrak district of Odisha, India on the bank of the River Baitarani.
Aul is a town and the headquarters of Aul CD Block and Aul Tehsil in Kendrapara district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is 17 km from Chandabali.
Akhandalamani Temple (pronounced [akʰɔɳɖɔlɔmɔɳi]) at Aradi village, Odisha, India, is dedicated to Lord Shiva (Baba Akhandalamani). Aradi is about 37 kilometres (23 mi) away from Bhadrak.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanika Palace?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanika Palace is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanika Palace?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (107 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanika Palace?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanika Palace at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanika Palace?
faq.a: Stays in Kanika Palace start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kanika Palace?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rajkanika, Panki, Kendrapada, Lakhmi Varaha Temple, Chandabali, Aul, Odisha.
